info.name: Application Submission Flow
info.description: Exercises the full intake submission flow: verification checklist creation, service call results, expedited flagging, eligibility write-back, and person matching. Requires the mock server running at http://localhost:1080.

item.name: Create member A (SNAP + Medicaid — match: confirmed)
Create member B (SNAP only — match: no_match)

exec: pm.test('member B created', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(201); pm.collectionVariables.set('memberBId', pm.response.json().id); });

item.name: Create member C (Medicaid only — match: review_required)

exec: pm.test('member C created', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(201); pm.collectionVariables.set('memberCId', pm.response.json().id); });
pm.test('income A created', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(201); pm.collectionVariables.set('incomeAId', pm.response.json().id); });

item.name: Verifications created per program and household member

exec: const identityA = events.find(e => e.data?.category === 'identity' && e.data?.sourceId === memberAId);
const incomeA = events.find(e => e.data?.category === 'income' && e.data?.sourceId === incomeAId);
pm.test('identity verification found for member A', () => pm.expect(identityA).to.exist);
pm.test('income verification found for member A', () => pm.expect(incomeA).to.exist);
